title: The Modim Prayer: Why We Bow and Give Thanks
title_zh: Modim 祷文：为何我们鞠躬并献上感恩
title_he: תפילת מודים: למה אנחנו משתחווים ונותנים תודה
description: A close reading of the Modim blessing in the Amidah — the only blessing where the entire congregation bows — and its theology of gratitude.
historical_period: Talmudic Period (200-500 CE, corresponding to Han-Jin Dynasties)
author: Torah Light Project
